## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes
- [ ] Ran `make openapi` if I touched handler annotations (CI fails on a stale spec)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Updated docs (README/docs site) if behavior or config changed
